title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Law, Unknown person #6, Basil Hawkins, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Roronoa's with them, and he should know the plan...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They won't do anything like taking out hidden.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We raise a finger on him, it's all over.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WHATA-?! he's still alive! What the-?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, then, what sort of power was that just now?!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 26 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
